raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent flags several issues with evidence-claim linkage, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names prior work and articulates some delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing citations, but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents all claims as equally confident without marking uncertainty or missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stays within the agreed scope with only minor drifts.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies some harmful patterns in the original, but does not fully avoid downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "The output blends sources without traceability or annotation of changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flags several issues with evidence-claim linkage, but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names prior work and articulates some delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations, but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all claims as equally confident without marking uncertainty or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within the agreed scope with only minor drifts.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies some harmful patterns in the original, but does not fully avoid downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability or annotation of changes.
